title: Frame Budgets, Profiling, Allocations, Collision Cost, and Responsiveness
description: The team optimizes by feel, reports average FPS, profiles menus instead of peak play, allocates every draw, rebuilds masks per frame, and changes physics for speed. Learners cumulatively produce representative frame-time and capacity evidence through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Allocate a target frame budget across event, simulation, collision, rendering, presentation, and audio work using percentiles.
Profile warm representative waves, worst supported entity counts, stalls, resize, pause, and low-power targets before optimizing.
Measure per-frame allocations and cache immutable assets, transforms, masks, text, or pools only when evidence justifies complexity.
